contacts_created.description: Number of new contact records created in the CRM.

contacts_updated.description: Number of existing contact records updated in the CRM.

activities_logged.description: Number of activity records successfully logged.

companies_created.description: Number of new company records created during contact linking.

companies_linked.description: Number of contacts linked to an existing company record.

errors.description: List of any write failures. Presence of errors does not mean the batch was aborted.

identifier.description: Email or other identifier of the affected record.

crm_record_ids.description: Maps each contact email to their CRM record ID (created or existing).
